input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: general static

            rule S.1: GENERAL STATIC
S.1 GENERAL STATIC

Cost    100 points

Total      325 points

final_answer: rule S.1: GENERAL STATIC S.1 GENERAL STATIC Presentation 75 points Cost 100 points Design 150 points Total 325 points
